title: Cookie Policy
metaDescription: See how ConvertBase.app uses cookies for site functionality, Google Analytics, Google AdSense and basic preferences.
heading: Cookie Policy
content: This Cookie Policy explains how ConvertBase.app uses cookies and similar technologies when you browse the site.
Cookies help us keep the platform stable, understand how pages are used and support advertising where enabled.

sections.title: What cookies do on this site
paragraphs: Cookies can store limited information in your browser so pages load correctly, preferences are remembered and consent choices can be respected.
We may also use cookies to understand general traffic patterns and improve the experience across devices and languages.

sections.title: Analytics and advertising cookies
paragraphs: Google Analytics may use cookies to provide reports about visits, traffic sources and user behavior on ConvertBase.app.
Google AdSense may use cookies to deliver and measure advertising. Third-party advertising settings can usually be managed through your browser or advertising provider controls.

sections.title: Managing cookies
paragraphs: You can control or delete cookies through your browser settings. Blocking some cookies may reduce site functionality or affect how ads and analytics work.
If you need more information about our use of cookies, contact contact@convertbase.app.
